invalidFileType: Only JPEG, PNG, HEIC images and PDFs are allowed.
failedToStoreFile: Failed to store file. Storage may be full.
storageFull: Storage is full. Try removing attachments or clearing completed items.
storageCritical: Device storage is almost full. Some features may not work.
storageCleanupComplete: Freed space by removing uploaded files.

seatRequiredForWrite: A seat is required for write operations. Contact your organization owner.
